<!-- Generated by ArcKit /arckit:pages -->
# ibn-core

> Enterprise architecture governance artifacts for `ibn-core`, generated with [ArcKit](https://arckit.org) 5.11.0. This repository contains structured documentation — requirements, stakeholders, risk registers, business cases, architecture decisions, diagrams, data models, and vendor evaluations — using ArcKit's template-driven workflow and versioned document IDs (`ARC-NNN-TYPE-vX.Y`).

ArcKit maintains a traceability chain: Stakeholders → Goals → Requirements (BR/FR/NFR/INT/DR) → Data Model → Components → User Stories. Every document follows a standard Document Control header and lives under `projects/NNN-name/` with multi-instance types (ADRs, diagrams, Wardley maps, research, data contracts) nested in typed subdirectories.

## Documentation site

- [Dashboard and document viewer](./index.html): Interactive web UI with KPI dashboard, category charts, governance checklist, sidebar navigation, and Mermaid diagram rendering.
- [Manifest](./manifest.json): Machine-readable JSON index of every artifact, guide, and project in this repository.

## Project status

- 001-ibn-core-my: 88% essential coverage · 42% compliance readiness · 19 drafts · next: /arckit:conformance

## Global artifacts

- [Architecture Principles](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vpnetconsult/ibn-core/main/projects/000-global/ARC-000-PRIN-v1.0.md): Architecture · `ARC-000-PRIN-v1.0`.
- [Architecture Strategy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vpnetconsult/ibn-core/main/projects/000-global/ARC-000-STRAT-v1.0.md): Planning · `ARC-000-STRAT-v1.0`.
